plugins.name: roundtable
plugins.description: Convene a round table of frontier AI models — Grok, Codex/OpenAI, GLM, MiniMax, Claude, and Gemini — for independent perspectives and chaired deliberation to consensus. Drives the globally-installed `roundtable` CLI.
